name: Mobile habit tracker — student morning routine

persona.name: Aanya
persona.background: psychology grad student, never shipped an app before
persona.decision_style: wants Maya to drive on tech; will push back hard on scope creep and UX details

product.concept: A mobile-first morning-routine tracker that wakes a college student up, walks them through 4 micro-habits in under 6 minutes, and shows a weekly streak.
product.target_user: US college students aged 18-22 who repeatedly fail at morning routines because their phones lure them into Instagram in bed.
product.known: Mobile-first (iOS first if I have to pick). No social features — this is private. Free to use. I want it to feel like a tiny game.
product.unknown: Should it be Expo / React Native / native? Where do I host the backend? Do I even need a backend?

objectives: Push back if Maya suggests social/community features.
Want Maya to surface whether a backend is needed for v1 at all (or if all-on-device works).
Need a sprint plan that includes the 'streak' logic + the 4-habit walkthrough screen.
